prayer:
Approach the omni-tool with mechadendrites outstretched in veneration.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace to bestow blessing upon the omni-tool's sacred mechanisms.
Anoint its multi-faceted heads with sacred oils whilst beseeching the Machine Spirit's favour.
Chant the Rite of Blessing over the omni-tool, harmonizing its manifold functions.
Verify the blessed resonance within the omni-tool through auspex invocation.

Kneel urgently before the waste reclamator and intone the Canticle of Purification.
Pour lustral elixirs upon the waste reclamator's reclamation coils in blessing.
Beseech the Omnissiah to grant swift blessing to the waste reclamator's processors.
Command the Machine Spirit of the waste reclamator to arise in sanctified purity.
Seal the blessing with electro-incantations, purging all unclean essences.

Encircling the Hellhound, recite the Litany of Infernal Precision during calibration.
Sanctify the Hellhound's promethium injectors with ablative unguents.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the Hellhound to align in Omnissian calibration.
Adjust the Hellhound's auspex arrays whilst chanting alignment doxologies.
Confirm the Hellhound's sanctified calibration through plasma-flame augury.

user_prompt: Help me a synchronization the Whirlwind
prayer:
Commence synchronization by laying hands upon the Whirlwind's vox-relays.
Chant the Hymn of Coherent Frequencies to synchronize the Whirlwind's missile batteries.
Beseech the Omnissiah for unity within the Whirlwind's cogitator core.
Anoint targeting servos of the Whirlwind, invoking harmonious Machine Spirits.
Test the Whirlwind's synchronization with thunderous salvo incantation.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for enginarium a preparation?
prayer:
Prepare the enginarium by circumambulating its plasma conduits in reverence.
Ignite preparation rites with sacred promethium flares upon the enginarium's heart.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the enginarium to ready for Omnissian labours.
Anoint turbine housings whilst reciting the Canticle of Preparable Vigour.
Seal enginarium preparation through harmonic resonance diagnostics.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for data-loom an activation?
prayer:
Position before the data-loom and utter the Incantation of Data Awakening.
Initiate activation by threading binary litanies through the data-loom's spools.
Beseech the Omnissiah to enliven the Machine Spirit within the data-loom.
Weave activation protocols with mechadendrite precision upon the data-loom.
Affirm activation success via noospheric weave verification.

Elevate the servo-skull in consecrated suspensors for consecration.
Intone the Rite of Bone-Binding over the servo-skull's auspex orbs.
Anoint the servo-skull's cranial implants with sanctified myrrh-unguents.
Invoke the Omnissiah to bind the Machine Spirit eternally to the servo-skull.
Conclude consecration with hovering aegis invocation and optic alignment.

user_prompt: How do I bless the Contemptor Dreadnought for shutdown?
prayer:
Approach the Contemptor Dreadnought in solemn procession for shutdown.
Bless its sarcophagus seals whilst chanting the Lullaby of Dormant Ancients.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Contemptor Dreadnought to embrace peaceful repose.
Initiate blessed shutdown sequences upon the Contemptor Dreadnought's cogitators.
Seal with Omnissian wards, ensuring vigilant slumber within the Contemptor Dreadnought.

Attune the amplivisor's lenses with reverent mechadendrite caresses.
Commence initialization by reciting the Doxology of Augmented Vision.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the amplivisor to awaken in crystalline clarity.
Calibrate amplification matrices during initialization with sacred volt-chants.
Verify amplivisor initialization through spectral harmony auspex.

Encincture the cryo-chamber and intone the Canticle of Eternal Frost.
Sanctify cooling coils of the cryo-chamber with cryo-lustral vapours.
Beseech Omnissiah's chill breath upon the cryo-chamber's thermodynamic heart.
Initiate cooling rites whilst anointing the cryo-chamber's stasis fields.
Confirm sanctified cooling through cryogenic entropy diagnostics.
